bamboo_grove.name: Vapor-Station 9
bamboo_grove.desc: A floating industrial hub caught in a permanent storm of acidic rain. It is a Brutalist paradise of rusted steel and glowing hazard lights.

windy_peaks.name: Windy Peaks
windy_peaks.desc: A high cliffside trail swept by howling winds. More dangerous entities reside here.

demon_mount.name: The Synapse Collective
demon_mount.desc: The Synapse Collective is not a country in the traditional sense; it is a single, continental-sized organism. There are no borders, no capitals, and no individual dwellings.

dragon_nest.name: Dragon's Nest
dragon_nest.desc: The summit crater where the ancient Dragon Lord slumbers. The air crackles with pure energy.
